textByHash.52334511de81d9aaac3e9edfcc459450960bc1e2: What are all these horrible, icky zombies doing in my nice, clean palace? You! You're an adventurer! Get out there and sort this out!
textByHash.ff29e427a4eae95e49a39c229abf003b7acc82eb: Stay back! I won't let you eat me!
textByHash.c8b76d6a288c2f0b17de039bcf8142e711c7fd63: No, one has just had them installed. One has had the most marvellous idea to bring renewed happiness to one's own dearest husband.
textByHash.5b4c5f8b13652892f6f58e54309bc19201da7ad0: Oh dear - the common classes, oh how they fill one with intolerable levels of exasperation, I swear to be most true.
textByHash.d3a5d3b96524d689c65f77efd4a128c08e7f1502: Yes, be off with you, before I call the guards.
textByHash.eb1fee525f080b890f4ec581c37d4972c2d60361: Who else would I be speaking to, you funny little fool? Of course you.
textByHash.7914ba47722d0b68b9f0e02ff8b6021ac5db3305: Oh yes, sarcasm - how amusing. No, no, peasant - I have a question to ask of you, and you are required to answer.
textByHash.454d69defe6c11eeffc34ae0445029ec61b29ca7: Do you know of anyone who might have some degree of horticultural experience?
textByHash.8830ceffcfde4e61dc7323fc41eeeebfa817e65c: Well, hurry off then. You are of no use to me.
textByHash.60aea93a65bf01d0e7198306f5134ae4c77865a2: Oh, marvellous! Peasant, I hereby order you to assist me with a little project I have planned.
textByHash.ed25b2b43dc57cc9e27330ce695d2d79f260cb6e: Oh, what I have to deal with these days - to think this is what being a Queen has become. Very well then: would you ... good sir help me with a little project of mine?
textByHash.2091755631571ec43c86255061be6913a28e0583: Oh dear, what a pathetic creature you are. One would give you a list, but you do not appear to have room enough to carry it.
textByHash.0e5a54f1608b5cf0a2ba417aa0b757d990733035: Ah, more sarcasm - wonderful. Well, it is nice to have a master of the fine art of gardening to assist me; in the absence of any such person, I gladly accept your service.
textByHash.ad859e50abeb8732eb00fe11fd29a9da62827776: To answer your first question, you have noticed the new farming patches that we have had installed around us. We wish to grow many varied and exotic plants in them, to bring happiness back to my husband.
textByHash.ec5f8f2819b6b5edbed5ea7ce2201f00f4e93656: The very same, and that's 'His Most Royal Majesty' to you. Now we come to the plants that one wishes you to grow in these patches. I would tell you all at once, but I fear that your small mind would not cope.
textByHash.cc302df8aa515b71e87a91fd4fb3f8b80605632a: I have given you a list of the items that I need in each patch. One is sure that you will know how to use the list with each patch to find out what needs to go in each one. There is one more thing, though.
textByHash.a8577bcc3213b13ed0780cf7dc2f01950334643f: Obtaining the seeds may prove difficult if you go about it by hacking and slashing everything that moves. No, to gather these items you will need to employ a finer tactic; the art of persuasion.
textByHash.65b03ba2a6f718f45763123fbc83166f3f9a54cf: You must go at once and converse with the wise old man who is said to dwell in Draynor Village; he may guide you in mastering this delicate and sophisticated ability.
textByHash.51886479fdb58d2db8d020588f1dc6166b783f2a: Well don't allow one to delay you - it is probably the most constructive thing you could do with your life, to be honest.
textByHash.ba4e573546132b8a33c4bafd000bf479240d7999: Take better care with this one.
textByHash.72ea3a056ae2be565fc959ad7fb513eaf8e49628: You use the dormant object that lies between your ears, that's how. A statue may be far too heavy to carry, but simplicity itself to push.
textByHash.faca746afc70778912fa664d7ea4fcfc37d8e327: Yes peasant, push. One would give you something to help with this task, but you do not appear to have room enough to carry it.
textByHash.4fa5aae34e4fa28177a571642a63605c98b1ae47: Yes peasant, push. Here - take this trolley. You can use it to push the statues here.
textByHash.0e2971a1a002363b5eef9000af19c3e3172efd44: Haven't you got that list I gave you?
textByHash.28c69cdb2cd18cbb387f0282369e6b9e2b223b89: Oh dear, what a pathetic creature you are. One would give you another list, but you do not appear to have room enough to carry it.
textByHash.ad8701836ceae3fb0d6d287a5d7ba1862397ef59: Oh dear, what a pathetic creature you are. Here, have another one.
textByHash.7c2b4d263d9c2f22b4c773a0a934084978d94e97: Well, you are supposed to be the gardener here, but I would say not. One had the soil imported from an extremely fertile area at great cost - watering should not be necessary one would have thought.
textByHash.9d6f36405c0ebd40e5599283d0eebcf393252782: Very good peasant, thank you for showing one that, but one has given you a job to do. Do it.
textByHash.226d38ff64fb651d1f768b84e01be695877425b5: I want you to place a statue of Saradomin there.
textByHash.af4d1e340e94ecd3f15043024115d0ee6d44699b: I want you to place a statue of a Misthalin king there.
textByHash.4ba492ce77e93ae58b076003a807e38c02b97a7b: I want you to grow yellow orchids there.
textByHash.c8b3530beb8662bd189ae7e03b9a3971b569161c: I want you to grow pink orchids there.
textByHash.a399731868bd512c409414c45ca9868a76b64de0: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's delphiniums that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the delphinium patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.e679d151793293683e2e63a0d3719d048d0cf3b2: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's orchids that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the orchid patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.423282b6483bb574c4be2071de2d6dbe45312cbd: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's Burthorpe vine that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the Burthorpe vine patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.3e1ac9f06d3f1b35b53c918218fd27b5f0978cef: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a red rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the red rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.05aa0c6d1f81066106f66e001cf8c3f0d705e5c1: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a white rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the red rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.27a6cae53bb52e8065aaa4bef685e8163f434469: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a yellow rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the red rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.9f742193480fc726de90df7b459193412b19774e: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a red rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the white rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.d99bec7e5a3253ffa4836f9f0550a5b2e80975aa: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a white rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the white rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.60f72e564d3d83eef8c9c4cbba3302c07050c54f: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a yellow rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the white rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.f27ad86c2aca0cc052badcb4e3af6ea29a78713a: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a red rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the yellow rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.c0dda6c2e5344f51a1f8c87b1d86db2f3bbd72ae: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a white rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the yellow rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.ea1e3a7b7c14357262947fe90e80d06e829116f0: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's a yellow rosebush that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the yellow rosebush patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.c2a2f64b07de5af375bee82e2ba8054fb3ab8782: Yes, very good peasant, you've got the seed; but it's snowdrops that one wishes, not seeds. Plant it in the snowdrop patch, and let it grow.
textByHash.0cadf2b567f90c08faf7c2b3268db3b065d5fb34: Hey, why are you digging that up? Leave it alone!
textByHash.782137f4f3d3a1176100d61b512a8cd58d0bc258: One has gone to great pains to provide you with this beautiful garden!
textByHash.a802475c3b15effb9849d61527391b59f30b308f: YOU CAN SHOW ONE A LITTLE GRATITUDE!!
textByHash.091e9273659bad63c5298a7d37c47c623c4b7fbc: Well? Are you going to thank one, Rollie?
textByHash.faddb2d748d711eb9aec5f8ad55c44798012db59: SPEAK UP, I CAN'T HEAR YOU!!
textByHash.99a8eda77e2960a940b862804a7bfe93eda83980: Much better. Now get back to the castle and rule our kingdom.
textByHash.95f8f7d164b3aa06a9d61f699cd226442fbd0eda: Excuse my husband, he can be so rude sometimes.
textByHash.69cb668d3f2c07f927b8a48d2d7a22d436be9dec: Yes, and that's all he deserves! Here you go, your help here has proved invaluable.
textByHash.2e1a87cf31c05de59a67042bac3eb64ed6396015: Oh, let one see peasant - perhaps it is a potion for making supercompost?
textByHash.d81e680357f06381a25e14e3ed36f1c7586cbc05: You wish to know how to use it? Pour it on some normal compost and it will transform into supercompost. You can do this with a bucket of compost, although it is possibly wiser to use it on a full compost bin.
textByHash.5ae97026ba4e31a79efe9d1493803c979dce06e4: What, you want to dig up the plants that took one so long to grow? Don't be ridiculous, you silly little fool.
textByHash.e073d967374ac9bd5f05b52783e316c227ff70df: Impertinent peasant! Oh, if you promise to leave one alone then feel free to pick fruit from the White Tree. One is told that they are a great natural energy restorative.
textByHash.91cc6ffa8e3d3989cf3415a214a31f2386de1a95: Hey - what are you doing with that patch, peasant?!? One demands that you speak to one's self immediately!!
textByHash.38242f59ebb1b15adb4232f1ac04fcdb5811352f: I shall not allow you to climb my trellis, peasant. Only providing your assistance to my project might cause me to reconsider.
